judgeReasoning: The provided build script meets every required rubric point: it imports leadtype library APIs (not the CLI), calls convertAllMdx first to write markdown mirrors into public/docs/, then generates llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and the search index using generateLlmsTxt, generateLLMFullContextFiles, and generateDocsSearchFiles. It correctly passes product and nav from docs.config.ts to the generators. The critical ordering (conversion before full-context/search) is respected, so the script is fully correct.
